source_pr.title: *: fix data race in join.
source_pr.body:
After pr #2605 , we can't find data race in join. Indeed there exists some races.

1. MVMap's Get is not thread safe.
2. BigFilter and OtherFilter in join context should be copied. this is caused by #3139

symptoms: *: fix data race in join. | result = tk.MustQuery("select a.c1 from t a , t1 b where a.c1 = b.c1 and a.c1 + b.c1 > 5 order by b.c1") (executor/join_test.go)
failure_signature: *: fix data race in join. | result = tk.MustQuery("select a.c1 from t a , t1 b where a.c1 = b.c1 and a.c1 + b.c1 > 5 order by b.c1") (executor/join_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: *: fix data race in join. | result = tk.MustQuery("select a.c1 from t a , t1 b where a.c1 = b.c1 and a.c1 + b.c1 > 5 order by b.c1") (executor/join_test.go)
files: executor/builder.go, executor/join.go, executor/join_test.go, expression/expression.go, util/mvmap/fnv.go, util/mvmap/mvmap.go, util/mvmap/mvmap_test.go
